2026-02-27T12:34:29.8699376Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-02-27T12:34:29.8704847Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/gatitos/gatitos
2026-02-27T12:34:29.8736914Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-02-27T12:34:29.8744074Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-02-27T12:34:29.8778939Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-02-27T12:34:29.9016358Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-02-27T12:34:29.9021963Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-02-27T12:34:29.9055996Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-02-27T12:34:29.9290885Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-02-27T12:34:29.9298771Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-02-27T12:34:29.9333538Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
